q: What is the fastest land animal?
exp: The cheetah reaches about 110 km/h in short bursts.

q: Which group does a frog belong to?
exp: Amphibians live between water and land and have moist skin.

q: How many hearts does an octopus have?
exp: Two pump blood to the gills and one to the rest of the body.

q: Which is the largest reptile in the world?
exp: It can exceed 6 metres in length.

q: How many neck vertebrae does a giraffe have?
exp: Just like humans, a giraffe has 7 neck vertebrae — only huge.

q: Which of these animals is an invertebrate?

exp: The bat is the only mammal capable of true flight.

q: Which animal produces silk for clothing?
exp: The silkworm caterpillar spins a cocoon from one continuous thread.

q: How many stomach chambers does a cow have?
exp: Cows are ruminants: rumen, reticulum, omasum and abomasum.

q: Which marine animal uses echolocation to navigate?
exp: Dolphins 'see' with sound, sending clicks and hearing the echo.

q: What is the largest big cat in the world?
exp: The Siberian tiger can weigh over 300 kg.

q: Which animal is famous for never forgetting and mourning its dead?
exp: Elephants show complex memory and social behaviour.
